quotes.text: Being a Christian is more than just an instantaneous conversion – it is a daily process whereby you grow to be more and more like Christ.
quotes.author: Billy Graham

quotes.text: The Lord will fight for you. You need only to be still.
quotes.author: Exodus 14:14

quotes.text: God cannot give us a happiness and peace apart from Himself, because it is not there. There is no such thing.
quotes.author: C. S. Lewis

cta.quote: Love is a fruit in season at all times, and within reach of every hand. It is the greatest gift anyone can give.
